label: Shadow data
description: Drop shadow shape and position settings. Maps to Verse.ShadowData in RimWorld source.

volume.label: Volume
volume.description: Size of the shadow ellipsoid as (x, y, z). Defaults to (1, 1, 1).

offset.label: Offset
offset.description: World-space offset of the shadow from the thing's origin as (x, y, z). Defaults to (0, 0, 0).
